creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
Remailing from misfiled PR (caught by spam-filter since it was > 80% HTML):

From: Stephen_Carter@dell.com
Date: Tue, 28 Nov 2006 12:55:20 +0200
Hi there,

Has a patch or fix been released for this issue?  I have a customer with
the same problem.

Thanks,

Stephen Carter
Enterprise Systems Consultant

email: Stephen_Carter@dell.com <mailto:Stephen_Carter@dell.com>
